title: A Truck Got Stuck In My (soon-to-be) Garden
content:
My new house has a big empty area on the side. I planned to extend the backyard to fill the rear and the rest for the garden ([posted](http://byway.macsf.net/post/218117819) a couple of days ago).

Yesterday, a truck came by to drop off the material for the extended backyard. Obviously, it was too heavy for the uncompacted sand/soil. It sunk.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_ks2wcsSw0J1qzw4y5.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_ks2wdheY3z1qzw4y5.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_ks2we5Psdx1qzw4y5.jpg)

Luckily, no serious harm has been done. Just some crack concrete which can be easily fixed.

Still a long way to go.
